svg.title: 技术与竞争壁垒：宏桥成本弹性 vs 中铝平台资源
svg.desc: 5 分制：越高代表该维度公开可见的竞争壁垒越强

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 技术与竞争壁垒：宏桥成本弹性 vs 中铝平台资源

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 5 分制：越高代表该维度公开可见的竞争壁垒越强

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 护城河不是单一技术，而是资源、能源、成本、产品与资本的组合。

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 宏桥成本效率强；中铝规模更大但资产更复杂

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 宏桥依托几内亚链条；中铝国内外资源和央企平台更宽

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 两者均推进云南等清洁能源布局，但有枯水期限电风险

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 中铝产品覆盖氧化铝、原铝、高纯铝、镓、能源、贸易

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 宏桥强在大槽型和一体化制造；中铝强在研发体系与品类

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif
Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 中铝央企属性在资源整合、融资和战略任务上更强

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 评分为本文基于公开披露的主观框架，不是财务预测；应结合铝价、电力、氧化铝和资本开支动态更新。

text.font-family: Arial, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 数据来源：公司年报/业绩公告、公开行业资料；评分为本文整理
